en.summary: In this prophetic tradition narrated through the chain of Imams back to the Prophet Muhammad (SAWW), the Prophet designates Sha'ban as his personal month and Ramadan as God's month. This hadith was delivered in the context of encouraging believers to fast voluntarily during Sha'ban as preparation for the obligatory fasting of Ramadan. The Prophet promises his personal intercession on the Day of Judgment for anyone who fasts even one day of Sha'ban, while fasting the entirety of Ramadan grants deliverance from Hellfire.

key_terms.شعبان: Sha'ban, the eighth month of the Islamic calendar preceding Ramadan
key_terms.رمضان: Ramadan, the ninth month of the Islamic calendar in which fasting is obligatory
key_terms.شفيع: Intercessor, one who intercedes on behalf of another
key_terms.القيامة: The Resurrection, the Day of Judgment

en.seo_question: What is the virtue of fasting in Sha'ban according to the Prophet Muhammad?

ur.summary: نبی کریم صلی اللہ علیہ وآلہ نے شعبان کو اپنا مہینہ اور رمضان کو اللہ کا مہینہ قرار دیا۔ شعبان میں ایک دن کے روزے پر آپ کی شفاعت اور رمضان کے روزوں پر آتش جہنم سے نجات کا وعدہ ہے۔

key_terms.شعبان: شعبان، رمضان سے پہلے کا مہینہ

ur.seo_question: شعبان میں روزے کی فضیلت نبی کریم کی نظر میں کیا ہے؟

tr.summary: Hz. Peygamber (s.a.v.s.) Şaban ayını kendi ayı, Ramazan'ı ise Allah'ın ayı olarak tanımlamıştır. Şaban'da bir gün oruç tutana şefaat, Ramazan orucunu tamamlayana ise cehennemden kurtuluş vaad edilmiştir.
tr.seo_question: Şaban ayında oruç tutmanın fazileti nedir?

fa.summary: پیامبر اکرم (ص) شعبان را ماه خود و رمضان را ماه خدا معرفی کرده‌اند. روزه یک روز در شعبان موجب شفاعت ایشان در قیامت و روزه رمضان موجب آزادی از آتش جهنم می‌شود.

key_terms.شعبان: شعبان، هشتمین ماه تقویم اسلامی پیش از رمضان

fa.seo_question: فضیلت روزه شعبان از نظر پیامبر اکرم چیست؟

id.summary: Nabi Muhammad (s.a.w.) menyatakan bahwa Sya'ban adalah bulannya dan Ramadhan adalah bulan Allah. Puasa satu hari di bulan Sya'ban mendapat syafaat beliau pada Hari Kiamat, sedangkan puasa Ramadhan membebaskan dari Neraka.

key_terms.شعبان: Sya'ban, bulan kedelapan kalender Islam sebelum Ramadhan

id.seo_question: Apa keutamaan puasa di bulan Sya'ban menurut Nabi Muhammad?

bn.summary: নবী মুহাম্মাদ (সা.) শাবানকে তাঁর নিজের মাস এবং রমজানকে আল্লাহর মাস বলে ঘোষণা করেছেন। শাবানে একদিন রোজা রাখলে তাঁর সুপারিশ এবং রমজানের রোজায় জাহান্নাম থেকে মুক্তি পাওয়া যাবে।

key_terms.شعبان: শাবান, রমজানের পূর্বের অষ্টম ইসলামি মাস

bn.seo_question: নবী মুহাম্মাদের মতে শাবান মাসে রোজা রাখার ফজিলত কী?

es.summary: El Profeta Muhammad (P) designó a Sha'ban como su mes personal y a Ramadán como el mes de Dios. Prometió interceder en el Día del Juicio por quien ayune un solo día en Sha'ban, y la liberación del Fuego para quien complete el ayuno de Ramadán.

key_terms.شعبان: Sha'ban, octavo mes del calendario islámico antes de Ramadán
key_terms.القيامة: La Resurrección, el Día del Juicio

es.seo_question: ¿Cuál es la virtud de ayunar en Sha'ban según el Profeta Muhammad?

fr.summary: Le Prophète Muhammad (P) a désigné le mois de Cha'bane comme son mois personnel et le Ramadan comme le mois de Dieu. Il a promis d'intercéder au Jour du Jugement pour quiconque jeûne un seul jour de Cha'bane, et la délivrance du Feu pour le jeûne complet du Ramadan.

key_terms.شعبان: Cha'bane, huitième mois du calendrier islamique précédant le Ramadan
key_terms.القيامة: La Résurrection, le Jour du Jugement

fr.seo_question: Quelle est la vertu du jeûne pendant le mois de Cha'bane selon le Prophète Muhammad ?

de.summary: Der Prophet Muhammad (SAWW) bezeichnete den Scha'ban als seinen persönlichen Monat und den Ramadan als den Monat Gottes. Er versprach seine Fürsprache am Tag des Gerichts für jeden, der auch nur einen Tag im Scha'ban fastet, und Befreiung vom Höllenfeuer für das vollständige Fasten im Ramadan.

key_terms.شعبان: Scha'ban, achter Monat des islamischen Kalenders vor dem Ramadan
key_terms.القيامة: Die Auferstehung, der Tag des Gerichts

de.seo_question: Was ist die Tugend des Fastens im Scha'ban laut dem Propheten Muhammad?

ru.summary: Пророк Мухаммад (САВАС) назвал Шаабан своим месяцем, а Рамадан — месяцем Аллаха. За однодневный пост в Шаабане обещано заступничество Пророка в День Суда, а за полный пост Рамадана — освобождение от адского Огня.

key_terms.شعبان: Шаабан, восьмой месяц исламского календаря перед Рамаданом

ru.seo_question: Какова добродетель поста в месяце Шаабан по словам Пророка Мухаммада?

zh.summary: 先知穆罕默德（愿主赐福他及其家属）将沙尔班月称为他自己的月份，斋月称为真主的月份。在沙尔班月斋戒一天可获得先知在审判日的说情，完成斋月全部斋戒则可从火狱中获释。

key_terms.شعبان: 沙尔班月，伊斯兰历第八个月，斋月前一个月

zh.seo_question: 先知穆罕默德说沙尔班月斋戒有什么美德？

isnad_matn.isnad_ar: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ بْنِ إِسْحَاقَ الطَّالَقَانِيُّ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ الْهَمَدَانِيُّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عَلِيُّ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيِّ بْنِ فَضَّالٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ مَرْوَانَ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ عَنِ الصَّادِقِ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي أَبِي عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ جَدِّهِ عَلَيْهِمُ السَّلَامُ قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ
isnad_matn.matn_ar: شَعْبَانُ شَهْرِي وَرَمَضَانُ شَهْرُ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ فَمَنْ صَامَ مِنْ شَهْرِي يَوْمًا كُنْتُ شَفِيعَهُ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ وَمَنْ صَامَ شَهْرَ رَمَضَانَ أُعْتِقَ مِنَ النَّارِ

narrators.name_ar: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ بْنِ إِسْحَاقَ الطَّالَقَانِيُّ
narrators.name_en: Muhammad ibn Ibrahim ibn Ishaq al-Talaqani
narrators.known_identity: Muhammad ibn Ibrahim ibn Ishaq al-Talaqani, a student and transmitter for Shaykh al-Saduq
Ahmad ibn Muhammad al-Hamadani, hadith transmitter

narrators.name_ar: عَلِيُّ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيِّ بْنِ فَضَّالٍ
narrators.name_en: Ali ibn al-Hasan ibn Ali ibn Faddal
narrators.known_identity: Ali ibn al-Hasan ibn Ali ibn Faddal (d. 291 AH), prominent Fathite hadith transmitter who later returned to the Twelver path

narrators.ambiguity_note: Refers to al-Hasan ibn Ali ibn Faddal, identified by the preceding narrator
narrators.known_identity: al-Hasan ibn Ali ibn Faddal, prominent Kufan hadith scholar
Marwan ibn Muslim, hadith transmitter from the companions of Imam al-Sadiq (AS)
Imam Ja'far al-Sadiq (AS), the sixth Imam (d. 148 AH)

narrators.ambiguity_note: Imam al-Sadiq referring to his father
narrators.known_identity: Imam Muhammad al-Baqir (AS), the fifth Imam (d. 114 AH)

narrators.ambiguity_note: Imam al-Baqir referring to his father
narrators.known_identity: Imam Ali ibn al-Husayn Zayn al-Abidin (AS), the fourth Imam (d. 95 AH)

narrators.ambiguity_note: Could refer to Imam al-Husayn (AS) or the Prophet (SAWW) through the chain; most likely Imam al-Husayn (AS) given the chain proceeds to the Prophet directly after
narrators.known_identity: Imam al-Husayn ibn Ali (AS), the third Imam (d. 61 AH)

key_phrases.phrase_en: May God bless him and his family
May God be pleased with him

similar_content_hints.description: Numerous hadiths from the Prophet (SAWW) encourage fasting in Sha'ban, including traditions where he was observed to fast the entire month or most of it as preparation for Ramadan.
Hadiths about the intercession (shafa'a) of the Prophet Muhammad on the Day of Judgment for members of his community who performed specific acts of worship.

Traditions emphasizing that fasting in Ramadan leads to forgiveness of sins and deliverance from Hellfire, including the well-known hadith that the gates of Paradise are opened and the gates of Hell are closed during Ramadan.
